name: overnight-ops
description: Deploy stack, logging, verify rate limits, admin bans API, health metadata, deploy runbook

requirements.description: Add docker-compose.prod.yml with app service (build Dockerfile) and postgres, wired to existing db service pattern
acceptance: Defines app service building from Dockerfile on port 8000
Uses DATABASE_URL pointing at postgres service

test.description: Add tests/test_compose_prod.py checking compose prod file references app, db, and port 8000

implement.description: Create docker-compose.prod.yml extending base compose with app service and env_file pattern

requirements.description: Add request ID middleware and optional JSON logging when LOG_JSON=true

implement.description: Add middleware, register in main.py, configure logging format from settings

requirements.description: Rate-limit /api/verify/precheck and /api/verify/submit per client IP hash
acceptance: Limit configurable via VERIFY_RATE_LIMIT_PER_MINUTE in config.py

test.description: Add tests/test_verify_rate_limit.py that hammers precheck and expects 429

implement.description: Implement in-memory sliding window limiter in singulr/services/rate_limit.py

requirements.description: Read-only GET /api/admin/bans protected by ADMIN_API_KEY header
acceptance: With valid X-Admin-Key returns JSON list of bans

implement.description: Add singulr/api/admin.py router and wire in main.py

requirements.description: Extend GET /health with version and uptime_seconds fields
acceptance: GET /health JSON includes version string and uptime_seconds number

test.description: Extend tests/test_health.py for version and uptime_seconds

implement.description: Track app start time in main.py lifespan, read version from singulr package or pyproject

requirements.description: Write docs/DEPLOY.md runbook covering compose prod, env vars, Telegram setup, and health checks
acceptance: Documents ADMIN_API_KEY and docker compose prod command
tests/test_deploy_doc.py asserts DEPLOY.md mentions key sections

test.description: Add tests/test_deploy_doc.py checking DEPLOY.md headings and keywords
